Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

(3 comments)

I don't understand this patch.  I thought the goal was to enable COS only for distributed DNE operations, instead of enabling it for ALL operations?  Enabling COS for all operations will hurt performance significantly, but COS on local operations isn't necessary for DNE consistency AFAIK.

Patch Set 7:

Build Started https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/35360/

Patch Set 7: Verified-1

Build Failed 
 
https://build.hpdd.intel.com/job/lustre-reviews/35360/ : FAILURE

Abandoned

http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/12530/12 replaces this patch, so for DNE COS locks will be ignored by local operations, but be checked against cross-MDT lock or specified explicitly with LDLM_FL_COS_INCOMPAT.

parents.subject: LU-3538 ldlm: add strict COS lock

commit.subject: LU-3538 dne: enable CoS for DNE by default
commit.message:
LU-3538 dne: enable CoS for DNE by default

add KEY_MDT_COUNT to fetch MDT count to know where system is DNE,
if it is, enable Commit-on-Share by default.

check and set CoS in mdt_save_lock() in case MDT is added after
system is up.

add conf-sanity.sh 70e for this.

Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ie9650e649f2732275f585fda7897bd052cdd5a63
